title: solanum nigrum var. croceum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. croceum, also known as the yellow nightshade or poisonous nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum nigrum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. croceum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as diarrhea and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from its leaves, roots, and fruits.
